title: Content Coordinator
description:
Welcome to the Studio




Studio 49 was founded in 2015 and has since then been supporting hospitality and tourism companies in all areas of Content Production, Communications and Online Marketing, including Social Media, Web-Design, Performance Marketing and Content Production.




Studio 49 combines its hospitality roots with online marketing expertise to help clients maximize their digital opportunities. Our mission is to make the hospitality industry more digitally connected, enabling companies to fully utilize their online marketing potential. From our home base in Berlin, our 15+ creative brains from all over the world aim to become one of the leading global online marketing agencies in the hospitality and tourism sector.




Everything you need to know




Entry date: As soon as possible 

Duration: Permanent, unlimited contract

Employment: Full-time (40hours / week) or part-time (min 30hours / week)

Location: Berlin, Germany. Occasional remote working is possible 

Salary: Basic salary + bonuses 

Level of education: Bachelor's degree or comparable apprenticeship in Social Media Management/ Online Marketing/ Communications or relevant professional experience in Hospitality/ Tourism

Languages: Exceptional proficiency in English and German, with excellent command of both written and spoken forms. French is a plus.

Experiences: Video Production, Video Editing, Graphic Design, Social Media, Hospitality, Tourism

Skills: Great communication skills, open-minded, general understanding of the hospitality industry, professional appearance, team spirit, proficiency in Microsoft Office




Details on the role: Content Coordinator




As a Content Coordinator, reporting to the Content Director, you will collaborate closely with the team to develop exciting content formats and campaigns for our hospitality clients. You will be at the heart of our content productions, from brainstorming and planning to being on set and making sure everything runs smoothly. You will scout the latest social media trends and bring fresh, creative ideas to the table, while also coordinating with our photographers and videographers during post-production to ensure the final content is top-notch. We also expect you to jump behind the camera, to shoot and edit content yourself for certain clients. If you have graphic design skills up your sleeve and know your way around the Adobe Creative Suite (and Canva), that’s a BIG plus.

We are looking for someone who is passionate (addicted) to social media content, who has an eye for aesthetic and who has great organizational skills to make sure projects run smoothly and stress-free. We also value proactiveness and need a positive team player who would be excited to experiment and learn with us.




What you can expect




💰   Competitive salary package including success-based bonuses

📅  Flexible working hours, including remote working options

✅   Safe and inclusive workspace - we really do have fun here

📈   Great opportunities to learn and space to grow

💪 Support for fitness club membership

😀  A bright office and the unbeatable 49ers’ team spirit

title: Influencer Manager, Germany (contract)
description:
This temporary assignment will be working at Airbnb, and may involve working at an Airbnb site, you will however be contracted through Magnit Global, a UK registered employment business with the company registration number 05537535.

Temporary work opportunities align well with people who are looking for career flexibility and less traditional ways of working, but at the same time are people driven to deliver amazing work in high-profile situations. Magnit Direct Sourcing is a service offered by Magnit Global that provides top talent directly to industry leading clients who have flexible temporary assignments that work on a variety of projects and unlock opportunities for exciting work.

Airbnb was born in 2007 when two Hosts welcomed three guests to their San Francisco home, and has since grown to over 4 million Hosts who have welcomed more than 1 billion guest arrivals in more than 100, 000 cities and towns located in 220+ countries and regions across the globe. Every day, Hosts offer unique stays and one-of-a-kind activities that make it possible for guests to experience the world in a more authentic, connected way.

Airbnb was born with a creative spirit, and it’s one of the most defining parts of our culture. We use our curiosity and imagination to come up with unconventional solutions. These are the ideas at the core of Airbnb:


 * Our community is based on connection and belonging.
 * Our creativity allows us to imagine new possibilities for people.
 * Our responsibility is to all of our stakeholders.
 * It takes a unified team committed to our core values to embody these ideas, and our fast-moving team is committed to leading as a 21st century company.
   
   

Airbnb is a mission-driven company dedicated to helping create a world where anyone can belong anywhere. It takes a unified team committed to our core values to achieve this goal. Airbnb's various functions embody the company's innovative spirit and our fast-moving team is committed to leading as a 21st century company.

The Community You Will Join:

The Airbnb Communications team helps drive earned visibility and cultural relevance for the brand, delivering thoughtful campaigns that support direct traffic and brand love. As part of our influencer function, you’ll work within a team that sits at the intersection of culture, content, and community – leading locally resonant, social-first campaigns that inspire and inform.

The Difference You Will Make:

We are looking for a dynamic, collaborative, and creative Influencer Manager to lead execution of Airbnb’s influencer strategy in Germany. In this role, you’ll localize regional priorities and deliver best-in-class campaigns that connect Airbnb to culturally relevant conversations and communities.

You’ll be responsible for managing day-to-day influencer execution: identifying and nurturing creator relationships, leading campaigns end-to-end, overseeing briefing and contracting, and partnering closely with internal stakeholders, and agency teams. This is a hands-on role for someone passionate and knowledgeable about the power of influencer marketing and knows how to translate brand objectives into content that is native, thumb-stopping and earns influence, not interrupts.

A Typical Day:

Execute local influencer campaigns aligned to regional and global priorities, owning timelines, creative execution, and performance tracking

Build and manage strong relationships with creators - from up-and-coming talent to seasoned partners - to ensure authentic storytelling and long-term brand advocacy

Identify and vet influencers for brand and campaign fit across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube, ensuring inclusive, culturally relevant casting

Draft clear, strategic briefs that reflect campaign objectives, key messages, and content guidelines

Partner with legal and agency teams to draft and negotiate influencer contracts, including deliverables, usage rights, paid media options, exclusivity, and payment

Collaborate with internal teams (PR, social, marketing, legal, and community) to ensure seamless campaign delivery

Manage all logistics for influencer stays or experiences - including vetting, Host coordination, credit/coupon approvals,

Lead influencer onboarding and content reviews to ensure quality and alignment with Airbnb brand standards

Track influencer performance, deliver regular updates to the regional team, and support the creation of end-of-campaign reports across all social channels (with support from agency)

Work with the Marketing Affiliates team and regional influencer lead to align plans, avoid duplication of efforts, and maximize impact of our influencer campaigns

Stay plugged into culture and trends: bringing forward creator ideas, campaign hooks, and reactive opportunities in real time

Monitor performance using tools such as CreatorIQ and Sprinklr; partner with agency to optimize campaigns accordingly

Your Expertise:

5–7 years of experience in influencer marketing, talent partnerships, or social-first content strategy

A deep understanding of the creator landscape in Germany and strong instincts on what content resonates and why

Proven ability to manage end-to-end influencer campaigns: from sourcing and briefing to contracting and performance analysis

Experience working with social platforms including Instagram, TikTok and YouTube

Confident managing external agencies and multiple stakeholders across legal, marketing, and comms

Strong written and verbal communication skills; experience writing briefs and reviewing content

Comfortable with creator negotiations, including deliverables, usage rights, and paid media

Familiarity with influencer marketing tools (CreatorIQ, Sprinklr or similar) and reporting best practices

Able to juggle multiple campaigns, creators, and deliverables at once while maintaining high attention to detail

Passion for storytelling, digital culture, and brand building through the creator economy

Our commitment to inclusion & belonging:

Airbnb is committed to working with the broadest talent pool possible. We believe diverse ideas foster innovation and engagement, and allow us to attract creatively-led people, and to develop the best products, services and solutions. All qualified individuals are encouraged to apply.

Magnit Global is a leading, global professional services and technology company. We have been a leader in contingent workforce management since 1991 and work with leading Fortune 500

companies and other large organizations across numerous verticals including consumer electronics, research and development, pharmaceuticals, health services, and many more. To do our best work we need different viewpoints. Therefore, we celebrate diversity and embrace inclusion. As an equal opportunity employer, we are dedicated to building a team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. We strive to ensure that we maintain a positive and enriching work environment for all.

title: Marketing Specialist Fully Remote
description:
About The Job

Mercor connects elite creative and technical talent with leading AI research labs. Headquartered in San Francisco, our investors include Benchmark, General Catalyst, Peter Thiel, Adam D'Angelo, Larry Summers, and Jack Dorsey.

Position: Marketing Professional

Type: Contract

Compensation: $40–$60/hour

Location: Germany

Duration: 2 months

Commitment: 20+ hours/week

Role Responsibilities


 * Translate, adapt, and synthesize complex calculations, analytics, and practices in marketing in Germany.
 * Write fluently in both German and English, ensuring correct marketing terminology and nuanced expression across languages.
 * Provide cultural insights specific to German marketing, reflecting cultural norms and media habits that drive marketing effectiveness.
 * Work closely with reviewers and peers to refine content, validate accuracy, and align outputs with marketing standard practices in Germany.
 * Work independently and asynchronously to meet deadlines while improving AI model performance.
   
   

Qualifications

Must-Have


 * Native-level fluency in German with strong written and spoken English.
 * Degree in marketing, communications, advertising, or a similar field.
 * 2–6+ years of experience in marketing in Germany.
 * Excellent writing, analytical, and communication skills.
   
   

Preferred


 * Experience with assessment and rubric development.
 * Familiarity with generative AI models or machine learning concepts.
   
   

Application Process (Takes 20–30 mins to complete)


 * Upload resume
 * Complete an AI-led interview to assess language ability and professional experience
 * If selected, take a follow-up AI-led interview to assess your professional background
 * Complete a paid work trial to determine if this type of work is suited for you
 * Receive feedback and be onboarded to the project
   
   

Resources & Support


 * For details about the interview process and platform information, please check: https://talent.docs.mercor.com/welcome/welcome
 * For any help or support, reach out to: support@mercor.com
   
   

PS: Our team reviews applications daily. Please complete your AI interview and application steps to be considered for this opportunity.

,

title: Retail Marketing Specialist (m/f/d)
description:
Location: Frankfurt am Main

Company: BYD Automotive GmbH

Reporting to: Retail Marketing Manager

About the Role:

As a Retail Marketing Specialist, you will play a key role in developing and executing marketing strategies to strengthen brand positioning and drive retail sales performance. You will work closely with dealerships and internal stakeholders to ensure impactful campaigns, promotional activities, and customer engagement initiatives that enhance the retail experience.

Key Responsibilities:


 * Develop and implement retail marketing strategies to increase customer engagement and drive vehicle sales
 * Coordinate local marketing campaigns, promotions, and dealer support programs
 * Analyze market trends, customer behavior, and competitor activities to optimize retail marketing initiatives
 * Support dealerships with marketing materials, digital tools, and training to ensure effective execution
 * Collaborate with internal teams, including sales, digital marketing, and product management, to align marketing efforts
 * Manage retail events, sponsorships, and activations to strengthen brand presence at the local level
 * Track and report marketing performance metrics, providing insights to improve campaign effectiveness
 * Ensure compliance with corporate branding guidelines and marketing policies
   
   

Your Profile:


 * Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field
 * Experience in retail marketing, preferably within the automotive industry
 * Strong understanding of consumer behavior and retail sales dynamics
 * Excellent communication and project management skills
 * Ability to work collaboratively with dealerships and cross-functional teams
 * Proficiency in digital marketing tools, social media platforms, and CRM systems
 * Creative mindset with a strategic approach to marketing execution
   
   

Why Join Us?


 * Opportunity to work in a dynamic and innovative industry.
 * Competitive salary and benefits.
 * Exposure to global automotive trends and strategies.
 * A collaborative team environment that fosters professional growth.

title: Full-Time Assistant Manager
description:
Apply in ~60 Seconds

Join Our Team

A career at Cinemark means you'll have epic opportunities to immerse yourself in our industry. But that's just the beginning — a front row seat means incredible growth as you bring new ideas to life to create an unforgettable experience for movie lovers worldwide.

Role Summary

Cinemark Assistant Managers assist in the overall operation of the theatre. They ensure policies and procedures are being followed and operational standards are achieved. They are cross trained in all departments to support where needed, and to provide inspirational training to all Employees. The Assistant Manager can become a Senior Assistant Manager followed by Theatre Manager or General Manager after finishing the Management Accreditation Program and working for a minimum of six months.

Responsibilities

The essential duties and responsibilities of an Assistant Manager include, but are not limited to, the following:


 * Follows the direction of the General Manager
 * Supports General Manager’s decisions in communication with the staff
 * Responsible for working in all departments and all theatre job functions
 * Trains and coaches Team Members in their specific job functions
 * Assists in the preparation of administrative and special reports for the General Manager
 * Observes and participates in the inspection of the theatre building, parking lot, landscaping, Cinemark property, roof and exterior signage, and equipment condition
 * Reports the need for building, property, and equipment repairs to General Manager
 * Ensures that theatre Team Members follow the dress code
 * Interacts with Guests for improved service in the theatre and ensures that Team Members are providing superior Customer service
 * Learns and follows the policies and procedures as established in Cinemark’s Guidelines. Enforces these with all Team Members fairly and consistently
 * Reports all Employee relations issues to the General Manager (In the absence of the GM, management should report Employee relations issues to www.convercent.com)
 * All management members must follow the Employee Relations Reporting Protocol
 * All management members are held at a high work ethic standard and code of conduct
 * Consistently identifies and sanitizes Employee and Gust high-contact
 * Properly utilizes Personal Protective Equipment while completing position-specific tasks
 * Adapts to the frequency and scope of required cleaning tasks
 * Properly addresses any safety or security issues (trip hazards, lighting, suspicious persons, etc.)
 * Performs other work-related duties as assigned
   
   

Requirements


 * Must be at least 18 years of age
 * High School or G.E.D. graduate preferred
 * Completion of three basic courses (Management Foundations, Annual Certifications, and MAP Core) within Cinemark’s Management Accreditation Program
 * Completes basic food handling training and obtains any local or state mandated certification, health card, or food handlers permit where required
 * Management members who work with alcohol are required to complete a Safe Alcohol Service training program
 * Availability to work flexible hours which include evenings, weekends, and holidays
 * Requires regular and consistent attendance
 * Has an energetic and friendly attitude during each shift
 * Provides excellent Guest service
 * Accurate cash handling and basic math skills
 * Interpersonal skills include the ability to communicate (verbal and written) with all ages, genders, and personalities. Must be able to effectively and regularly converse in and comprehend English
 * Ability to work in a team environment and independently
 * Ability to take and follow direction
 * Responds with a sense of urgency
 * Excellent time management, organizational skills, and attention to detail
 * Ability to train and lead others
 * Must be able to resolve conflict
   
   

Physical And Environmental Requirements


 * Frequent bending, kneeling, and lifting up to 50 lbs.
 * Frequent standing, walking and reaching around the theater.
 * Noise level may be moderate to high at times.
 * Be able to work in a standing position for extended periods of time.
   
   

Benefits Available

At Cinemark, we believe every team member should feel like a hero. Each career comes with a variety of blockbuster benefits for both hourly and salaried team members.


 * Employee Discount
 * 401(k) Matching*
 * Growth Opportunities
 * Education Assistance*
 * Health Benefits*
 * Parental Leave*
 * Paid Time Off*
 * Daily Pay*
 * Free Movies*
 * Benefits may vary by career category, so be sure to check the specific details on our career site.
   
   

DISCLAIMER: This job description is intended only as a general guideline of your duties and responsibilities at Cinemark and is not a legally binding contract. Cinemark reserves the right to amend, change or terminate the job description, as it deems appropriate. Any change amendments, or modifications may be implemented even though they have not been communicated, reprinted or substituted in this job description.

Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.

All Cinemark theatres are designated smoke-free workplaces. This includes vapor, electronic, conventional, cigars, etc.

Cinemark is an Equal Opportunity Employer

Pay Range: 16.32 - 20.40

title: BackOffice Professional (remote möglich) (m/w/d)
description:
BackOfficer unterstützt kleine und wachsende Unternehmen dabei, mehr Freiräume für die wichtigen Dinge zu gewinnen. Wir optimieren für unsere Kunden interne Abläufe mithilfe digitaler Lösungen und übernehmen administrative Aufgaben mit dem Ziel, Unternehmern und Geschäftsführern mehr Zeit für die Entwicklung ihres Geschäfts zu verschaffen.

Unsere Philosophie beruht auf einem gesunden Wachstums-Ansatz. Unsere eigenen Mitarbeiter stehen dabei im Mittelpunkt. Mit unseren Kunden und Mitarbeitern schaffen wir langfristige Beziehungen in einer vertrauens- und respektvollen Atmosphäre. Für uns geht Qualität immer vor Quantität.

Es gibt derzeit zwölf BackOfficer und wir sitzen in Köln-Deutz.

Wir sind ein Arbeitgeber, der die Chancengleichheit fördert und sich der Vielfalt verpflichte fühlt. Alle qualifizierten Bewerber werden ohne Rücksicht auf Ethnie, Hautfarbe, Religion, Geschlecht, sexuelle Orientierung, Geschlechtsidentität, nationale Herkunft oder Behinderung für die Stelle berücksichtigt. Wir verfolgen bei unseren Einstellungs- und Beschäftigungsbemühungen Strategien der positiven Diskriminierung um sicherzustellen, dass alle qualifizierende Personen uneingeschränkt Chancen auf eine Beschäftigung in allen Positionen haben.

BackOffice Professional (remote möglich) (m/w/d)

Aufgaben

Du Unterstützt Unser Backoffice-Team In Den Folgenden Bereichen


 * Du betreust eigenverantwortlich verschiedene Kunden und behältst den Überblick über alle Prozesse und Fristen der vorbereitenden Finanz- und Lohnbuchhaltung. Dabei wirst du durch unsere Standardisierungen und Automatisierungen vor allem in den Aufgabenbereichen Belegsuche, -erfassung und -zuordnung unterstützt, sodass du dich darauf fokussieren kannst, unsere Kunden in enger Abstimmung bis zu ihrem Monats- und Jahresabschluss zu begleiten.
 * Darüber hinaus erstellst du Ausgangsrechnungen, führst Zahlläufe aus und betreust das Mahnwesen unserer Kunden.
 * Idealerweise bringst du bereits Vorerfahrung in den Bereichen Personaladministration und/oder Reporting und Controlling mit.
   
   

Für uns ist wichtig, dass du die Zusammenhänge zwischen den verschiedenen Themenfeldern unseres Angebots verstehst und übergreifend umsetzt und dabei dein Verständnis der greifenden Regularien anwendest.

Das Ist Uns Wichtig


 * Das Wichtigste: Du passt als Mensch in unser Team.
 * Du bist ein Mensch mit einer positiven Einstellung zum Leben und zur Arbeit.
 * Du hast einen hohen Qualitätsanspruch an deine Arbeit und an die Ergebnisse für unsere Kunden.
 * Du packst gerne und proaktiv mit an, übernimmst Verantwortung und arbeitest selbstständig.
 * Dir geht nichts durch: Du arbeitest gründlich, sorgfältig und strukturiert und behältst den Überblick
 * Du schreibst und sprichst im Deutschen weitgehend fehlerfrei und reagierst angemessen auf verschiedene Kommunikationskanäle und Empfänger.
 * Du kennst dich mit Büro-Software-Anwendungen (z.B. Microsoft Word und Microsoft Excel) aus und kannst dich in die Bedienung neuer Software-Produkte zügig einarbeiten.
 * Du bringst Erfahrung in den gängigen Buchhaltungssoftware-Anwendungen (z.B. Datev Unternehmen-Online oder LexOffice) mit.
 * Idealerweise hast du außerdem Erfahrung mit Personaladministrationssoftware (z.B. Personio) und/ oder Finanzplanungssoftware (z.B. Agicap)
 * Du suchst einen beständigen Job, den du langfristig ausüben möchtest.
   
   

Haben wir dein Interesse geweckt?

Dann freuen wir uns auf deine Bewerbungsunterlagen!

Wir sind ständig auf der Suche nach Verstärkung. Du möchtest gerne zu einem späteren Zeitpunkt anfangen? Kein Problem! Melde dich bei uns und wir finden eine Lösung.

Was Wir Bieten


 * Für uns stehen unsere Mitarbeiter an erster Stelle.
 * Ob in Teilzeit oder in Vollzeit: Beim Arbeitsmodell sind wir offen für das, was für dich am besten passt. Du kannst entscheiden, wie viele Wochenstunden (zwischen 32 und 40) du arbeiten möchtest.
 * 100% remote: Nach unserem Onboarding bieten wir dir an, von zu Hause aus zu arbeiten. Wir statten dich entsprechend aus.
 * Planbare Arbeitszeiten: Du weißt weit im voraus, wann du wie viel arbeitest.
 * Wir sind ein großartiges und erfahrenes Team, das sich gegenseitig motiviert und aufeinander Acht gibt.
 * Deine Arbeit macht einen Unterschied. Du hilfst Unternehmern dabei, ihr Geschäft weiter zu entwickeln.

title: Junior CRM Manager (m/w/d)
description:
Die FFA GmbH ist ein schnell wachsendes Unternehmen, das unter anderem die Marken "Quantum Leap Fitness" und "Sjard Fitness" vertritt. Seit der Gründung 2015 verändern wir das Leben unserer Kunden mit unseren innovativen Produkten zu mehr Gesundheit und mehr Lebensqualität. So betreuen wir mittlerweile eine der größten deutschsprachigen Fitness-Communitys.


Unsere Produktpalette erschließt sich über den Verkauf in unserem eigenen Online-Shop von uns selbstentwickelten Nahrungsergänzungsmitteln sowie dem Vertrieb von digitalen und physischen Informationsprodukten.


Deine Mission bei der FFA GmbH


Als Junior CRM Manager (m/w/d) unterstützt du unser Marketing-Team dabei, unsere Kundenbeziehungen auf das nächste Level zu heben. Du arbeitest mit modernen CRM-Tools und entwickelst gemeinsam mit erfahrenen Kollegen Strategien, um unsere Community durch personalisierte E-Mail-Kampagnen, Automatisierungen und segmentierte Kundenansprachen noch enger an unsere Marken zu binden.


Wir freuen uns sehr auf dich!


Aufgaben

   
   
 * Unterstützung beim Aufbau, der Pflege und Weiterentwicklung unserer CRM-Systeme (E-Mail-Marketing, Automatisierung, Customer Journeys).
   
   
 * Erstellung, Umsetzung und Optimierung von Newsletter-Kampagnen und Marketing-Automationen.
   
   
 * Analyse von Kunden- und Kampagnendaten, um die Customer Experience stetig zu verbessern.
   
   
 * Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Performance Marketing, Content und Design, um ein konsistentes Kundenerlebnis über alle Kanäle hinweg zu schaffen.
   
   
 * Aktives Mitgestalten neuer Ideen, um Kundenbindung und -loyalität nachhaltig zu steigern.
   
   
 * Du verstehst verschiedene Zielgruppen und sprichst diese gezielt an.
   
   


Qualifikation

   
   
 * Du kannst erste Einblicke ins E-Mail-Marketing im Rahmen von Berufserfahrung, Praktika oder Werkstudententätigkeiten vorweisen.
   
   
 * Customer Journeys und Automationsstrecken sind für dich eine Spielwiese, auf der du deine Konzeptionsskills voll auslebst.
   
   
 * Du bist ein Kommunikationstalent und hast Freude am Texten sowie am Gestalten von Newslettern.
   
   
 * Du hast sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort & Schrift.
   
   
 * Du arbeitest eigenverantwortlich, hast eine performanceorientierte Denkweise und analytische Fähigkeiten, um selbstständig Optimierungspotenziale zu erkennen und voranzutreiben.
   
   
 * Du legst großen Wert auf kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung – sowohl fachlich, als auch persönlich - und siehst neue Aufgaben als Chance, deine Kompetenzen auszubauen.
   
   
 * Idealerweise betreibst du selber gerne Sport und Fitness ist ein Teil deines Lebens.
   
   


Benefits

   
   
 * Attraktive Vergütung: Bei uns zählen nicht Alter oder Ausbildung, sondern dein Einsatz und der Mehrwert, den du schaffst. Du erhältst ein sehr attraktives Gehalt und hast langfristig die Chance, Führungsverantwortung zu übernehmen.
   
   
 * Flexible Arbeitszeiten & 100 % Remote: Bei uns gibt es keinen festen 9-to-5-Job – du entscheidest selbst, wann und wo du deine Arbeit erledigst. Du genießt maximale Freiheit und Flexibilität.
   
   
 * Persönliches & fachliches Wachstum: Wir unterstützen dich dabei, dich zu einem der besten Marketer in Deutschland zu entwickeln. Egal, ob durch Online-Kurse, Workshops oder individuelle Coachings – bei uns kannst du dich fachlich und persönlich weiterentwickeln.
   
   
 * Supplemente aus unserem Shop: Als Teil unseres Teams darfst du dich jeden Monat über Produkte aus unserem Online-Shop freuen – z. B. Protein-Shakes, Riegel oder andere Supplements, die dir den Alltag versüßen.
   
   
 * Team-Events & echte Gemeinschaft: Zweimal im Jahr kommen wir alle zusammen – an inspirierenden Orten, um gemeinsam zu wachsen, uns auszutauschen und neue Ideen zu entwickeln.
   
   


Interesse geweckt? Wir freuen uns über deine Bewerbung!


Bitte bewerbe dich mit Angabe deiner Gehaltsvorstellung und deinem möglichen Startdatum.

title: KEY ACCOUNT MANAGER HOME / FURNITURE
description:
In 2001, Veepee revolutionised consumer spending by creating the concept of online sales-events, now better known as flash sales: branded products available in limited quantities, for a limited time (3 to 5 days), offered at a steep discount and with a creative and engaging presentation. In 2019, building on its European development strategy started in 2006, vente-privee changes its name to Veepee, a global brand present in 10 European countries. From being a non-specialist site dedicated to the online sale of stocks of major brands, Veepee has become a multi-specialist site with expertise in all the sectors in which it operates: Fashion, Footwear, Home, Children, Gourmet and Travel. Close collaboration with 7,000 brands allows Veepee to offer exclusive discounts compared to recommended retail prices. With 4,500 employees and millions of members worldwide, Veepee realised a net consumer sales value of EUR 3.3 billion in 2024.




📄 JOB DESCRIPTION

 * As Key Account Manager at Veepee, you will ensure the best brands, the best stocks and the best prices on your portfolio.
 * You will be pivotal in managing and expanding our strategic accounts. Your role will encompass both the acquisition of new accounts through prospection and development of existing partners. You will be the privileged contact for brands and your strong relationship skills will enable you to build powerful connections both internally and externally.
 * You will develop brands both on local and international markets, creating European interconnections and synergies.
 * Your key focus areas will include understanding partners needs, driving growth, and ensuring to reach portfolio targets. You will work closely with sales analysts and other internal teams to ensure partners satisfaction and contribute to the overall success of our business.
 * If you are passionate about building meaningful brand relationships, eager to learn in an international and dynamic company, we would love to hear from you.




🎯 MISSIONS

 * Prospection (New Accounts): Identify, engage, and onboard new strategic accounts, ensuring a robust and growing client portfolio.
 * Partnership & Relationship Development (Existing Accounts): Build, maintain, and deepen relationships with existing partners to ensure sustained growth and deliver the annual budget.
 * Deal Negotiation : Close agreements with our brand partners by negotiating the commercial and contract conditions
 * Market Knowledge: Maintain a keen understanding of market trends, competitor activities, and industry developments to enhance Veepee's market positioning.
 * Sales Coordination: Guarantee the internal negotiation needed with other functions to build the best solution to maximize performances (supply chain, planning, marketing,...)




👉 MUST HAVE skills

 * +5 years experience as Key Account Manager or similar role.
 * Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Marketing, or a related field.
 * You are result-oriented and have strong analytical skill.
 * You have a strong track record in prospection, account management and achieving sales targets.
 * You master communication technique and you have strong interpersonal skills.
 * You have excellent negotiation skills and perseverance to close deals and resolve conflicts with a proactive approach You are rigorous and can manage multiple tasks and deadlines simultaneously.
 * You are willing to learn and adapt to new challenges in a dynamic environment.
 * You are a team player and can collaborate with different departments in an international environment.
 * You master Google Apps and Office Pack, specially Gsheet, Slides and Excel.
 * You possess excellent Local Language and excellent English language skills.




✅ BENEFITS

 * A permanent full-time position with immediate start date.
 * A flexible working model with the option to work from home two days a week.
 * An attractive office in Düsseldorf's Media Harbour.
 * The opportunity to contribute your own ideas and shape the development of the company.
 * Your other benefits: company pension scheme, private supplementary insurance, public transport allowance, gym or sports club allowance.
 * Coffee, tea and water are available free of charge.
 * A team that sticks together and has fun at (and after) work.




❓ TEAM

 * Our Sourcing Germany team has been working closely with various brands in the fashion, home, sports, shoes, accessories and many other sectors for decades.
 * We offer a wide range of different commercial offers and are the founders of the flash sale principle.
 * All our business managers have a wealth of experience and will support you in advancing your personal development.




⚙️RECRUITMENT PROCESS

 * 1️⃣ 15-30 minute telephone interview with our HR manager
 * 2️⃣ 60 minute interview with hiring manager and HR manager
 * 3️⃣ Approx. 90 minute meeting with the team and initial practical insights into the tasks

title: I want to be part of the team!
description:
Your mission


Through predictive analytics and a B2B marketplace, Circunomics is challenging the automotive industry, OEMs, 2nd-life applications, and recyclers to embrace a more circular approach. Knowing that lifecycle planning is complex, we are here to help.

CX Video 2023: https://youtu.be/ZrFiz-M0Xrc

Product Video 2023:


Your profile


You


   
   
 * are a creative thinker
   
   
 * are a Powerful Communicator
   
   
 * have experienced working in Startups
   
   
 * have a curious Spirit
   
   
 * have an entrepreneurial mindset
   
   
 * have project planning and strategizing knowledge
   
   
 * have a high level of autonomy
   
   


Why us?

   
   
 * Flexible hours and work-from-home options
   
   
 * Great IT equipment: MacBook or DELL and monitor
   
   
 * Complimentary beverages
   
   
 * Modern offices located in the center of Frankfurt City
   
   
 * English as company language and international working environment
   
   
 * Attractive development perspectives with creative freedom for growth
   
   
 * Shape the future circular battery space and the green energy transition
   
   


About Us


Circunomics GmbH was founded in 2019 and is already one of the leading companies in battery circularity. The company is based in Mainz. Founders Felix Wagner and Jan Born have set themselves the goal of establishing a circular battery economy by inspiring a movement of taking batteries from first-life in electric vehicles to second-life applications and finally recycling any remaining raw materials.


The Circunomics team has developed an innovative digital marketplace where digital "circular twins" can be registered, tracked, and traded for battery packs. The company has been supported thus far by seed investors and business angels. Startup builder Next Mobility Labs, recycler TES, Orlen VC, and Dr. Peter Mertens, former Chief Technology Officer of Audi, are some key players.


US-based company Frost & Sullivan awarded Circunomics the 2023 Market Leadership Award. The award identified Circunomics as the best in class in the European circular marketplace for the battery trading industry.


Most recently, Circunomics was awarded 2nd Best StartUp 2023 within the automotive industry by Automobilwoche.


2023 Starting Up article on how Circunomics is making the battery industry greener

2023 Market Leadership Award Exposé by Frost & Sullivan

2023 Orlen Investment in Circunomics

title: Affiliate Content Intern (all genders)
description:
Highsnobiety all about style, culture, and the community driving it forward. We don’t just cover trends — we create them.

We’re looking for an Affiliate Content Intern (all genders) to join our team in Berlin!




Your Mission:

You’ll choose products for shopping articles, handle client approvals, and collaborate with our team to ensure timely delivery. Supporting the Editor with SEO and affiliate strategy, you’ll also help optimize content and Affiliate Revenue and assist with data analysis.







Your Skills:

We’re looking for a proactive & hands on student, ideally in journalism, marketing, culture or arts, who’s attuned to pop culture, industry developments and emerging trends and has knowledge of current social media technologies, platforms, audiences. Experience with Excel, Google Analytics, and photo editing is a plus. Native, bi-lingual, or professional fluency in English is a must.







What we offer:

We offer a spacious HQ near U Kurfürstenstraße, focused on well-being and sustainability. You'll enjoy creative independence, a commitment to DEIB, 2 extra days off for International Women’s Day and Juneteenth, flexible hybrid work, and a dog-friendly office.

Plus, we provide perks like ClassPass and access to mental health support platform OpenUp.




We’re looking forward to hearing from you!!

Don’t meet every requirement? Studies show that women and people of color often hesitate to apply unless they fit every qualification. At Highsnobiety, we value diverse perspectives and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. So, if you're excited about this role but don’t check every box, we still encourage you to apply!

title: Affiliates Lead
description:
Affiliates Lead




About Us

Prime Insights reaches millions of diverse users through our proprietary Market Research panels. Our innovative technology supports a global community and provides our members with a world-class survey-taking experience.




Our mission is to connect authentic members with our clients’ market research surveys, delivering meaningful insights through online quantitative research. Members are rewarded with valuable incentives, ensuring genuine and high-quality participation.

About the Role




We are looking for an experienced Affiliates Lead to oversee and scale our affiliate marketing operations. The ideal candidate will manage multiple affiliate networks and partners, optimize performance, and ensure the continuous growth of our user base through cost-effective acquisition channels. This role requires a strategic mindset, a strong understanding of affiliate ecosystems, and hands-on experience with affiliate tracking platforms.




Key Responsibilities

 * Affiliate Management: Build, maintain, and optimize relationships with affiliate partners and networks to achieve growth and ROI targets.
 * Network Oversight: Manage multiple affiliate networks, ensuring performance consistency and alignment with company goals.
 * Tracking & Analytics: Utilize tools like HasOffers and other affiliate tracking platforms to monitor, analyze, and optimize campaigns.
 * Performance Optimization: Track metrics such as CPL, CPA, and ROI, identifying opportunities for performance improvement.
 * Compliance & Quality: Ensure all affiliate activities align with brand guidelines and quality standards.
 * Collaboration: Work closely with marketing, analytics, and product teams to align affiliate strategies with overall growth initiatives.
 * Market Insights: Stay informed about industry trends, new tools, and emerging platforms to keep Prime Insights at the forefront of affiliate marketing innovation.




Qualifications

 * Proven experience in affiliate marketing or partnership management, ideally in digital or app-based businesses.
 * Strong understanding of affiliate networks, tracking systems, and performance marketing metrics.
 * Hands-on experience with similar tools such as Everflow, Tune, or Impact.
 * Strong analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data and optimize accordingly.
 * Excellent negotiation, communication, and relationship management skills.
 * Experience in the app industry is a plus, but not a requirement.




Our Culture

At Prime Insights, we embrace diversity and inclusion as the foundation of a thriving, innovative workplace. Our team represents 11 nationalities, speaks 12 languages, and operates remotely from 8 countries.

We believe that empowering employees with flexibility and autonomy fosters a healthy work-life balance, reduces stress, and boosts creativity. By allowing our team to work from wherever they are most productive, we ensure an environment built on trust, performance, and respect.




Please refrain from contacting company team members directly. You may submit your application through the “Easy Apply” button.

title: I want to be part of the team!
description:
Your mission


Through predictive analytics and a B2B marketplace, Circunomics is challenging the automotive industry, OEMs, 2nd-life applications, and recyclers to embrace a more circular approach. Knowing that lifecycle planning is complex, we are here to help.

CX Video 2023: https://youtu.be/ZrFiz-M0Xrc

Product Video 2023:


Your profile


You


   
   
 * are a creative thinker
   
   
 * are a Powerful Communicator
   
   
 * have experienced working in Startups
   
   
 * have a curious Spirit
   
   
 * have an entrepreneurial mindset
   
   
 * have project planning and strategizing knowledge
   
   
 * have a high level of autonomy
   
   


Why us?

   
   
 * Flexible hours and work-from-home options
   
   
 * Great IT equipment: MacBook or DELL and monitor
   
   
 * Complimentary beverages
   
   
 * Modern offices located in the center of Frankfurt City
   
   
 * English as company language and international working environment
   
   
 * Attractive development perspectives with creative freedom for growth
   
   
 * Shape the future circular battery space and the green energy transition
   
   


About Us


Circunomics GmbH was founded in 2019 and is already one of the leading companies in battery circularity. The company is based in Mainz. Founders Felix Wagner and Jan Born have set themselves the goal of establishing a circular battery economy by inspiring a movement of taking batteries from first-life in electric vehicles to second-life applications and finally recycling any remaining raw materials.


The Circunomics team has developed an innovative digital marketplace where digital "circular twins" can be registered, tracked, and traded for battery packs. The company has been supported thus far by seed investors and business angels. Startup builder Next Mobility Labs, recycler TES, Orlen VC, and Dr. Peter Mertens, former Chief Technology Officer of Audi, are some key players.


US-based company Frost & Sullivan awarded Circunomics the 2023 Market Leadership Award. The award identified Circunomics as the best in class in the European circular marketplace for the battery trading industry.


Most recently, Circunomics was awarded 2nd Best StartUp 2023 within the automotive industry by Automobilwoche.


2023 Starting Up article on how Circunomics is making the battery industry greener

2023 Market Leadership Award Exposé by Frost & Sullivan

2023 Orlen Investment in Circunomics

title: Referent:in Unternehmensleitung (m/w/d)
description:
Req ID:494784

Wir bei Alstom verstehen Verkehrsnetze und wissen, was Menschen bewegt. Von Hochgeschwindigkeitszügen, U-Bahnen, Monorails und Straßenbahnen bis hin zu schlüsselfertigen Systemen, Instandhaltung, Infrastruktur, Signaltechnik und digitaler Mobilität bieten wir unseren Kunden das breiteste Produktportfolio der Branche. Jeden Tag sind 80.000 Kolleg:innen weltweit auf dem Weg zu einer umweltfreundlicheren und intelligenteren Mobilität, indem sie Städte und Regionen miteinander verbinden und den CO2-Ausstoß reduzieren. Alstom beschäftigt in der DACH-Region an 16 Standorten rund 11.000 Mitarbeitenden.

Zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt suchen wir Sie als Referent:in Unternehmensleitung (m/w/d) für unseren Standort in Braunschweig. Die Besetzung dieser Stelle ist in Vollzeit oder Teilzeit möglich oder kann als Job-Tandem ausgeführt werden.

Ihre Rolle bei Alstom - Das bewegen Sie mit uns

In unserem modernen Büro am ARTmax in Braunschweig arbeiten über 250 Kolleg:innen aus 26 Ländern an der Forschung und Entwicklung für die Digitalisierung der Schiene im Fokus. Die Corporate Functions tragen maßgeblich dazu bei, die Leistungsfähigkeit unserer Standorte zu unterstützen und kontinuierlich auszubauen.

Ihre Aufgaben:


 * Ansprechpartner:in für alle administrativen Themen des Management Teams.
 * Koordination sowie Vor- bzw. Nachbereitung von internen & externen Terminen.
 * Vorbereitung von Präsentationen und Übersichten.
 * Organisation von Events, z.B. Workshops und Strategischen Offsites.
 * Identifikation von Optimierungspotenzialen.
 * Konzeptionelle Mitarbeit an strategischen Themen.
 * Aktives Mitglied im Assistenznetzwerk - regelmäßiger Austausch mit Assistent:innen anderer Standorte.
   
   

Ihr Profil:

Sie haben Freude daran im Team schnittstellenübergreifend zu arbeiten, sind kommunikativ, offen und ein Organisationstalent.

Darüber hinaus bringen Sie noch Folgendes mit:


 * Proaktive/selbständige Herangehensweise zur Lösungsfindung.
 * Organisationstalent und strukturiertes Arbeiten.
 * Kommunikationsstärke auf allen Hierarchieebenen.
 * Analytisches Denken und Problemlösungskompetenz.
 * Spaß an einem internationalen Umfeld.
 * Sehr gute Kenntnisse in der Anwendung von MS Office.
 * Verhandlungssichere Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse.
 * Grundsätzliche Reisebereitschaft für gelegentliche Dienstreisen.
   
   

Unser Angebot – Was wir bieten

Mobilität kennt für uns nur eine Richtung: Nachhaltigkeit. Die Bahnbranche bietet langfristige Perspektiven und die Möglichkeit, sich im Laufe der Karriere stetig weiterzuentwickeln und neue Erfahrungen zu sammeln.


 * Einen abwechslungsreichen Arbeitsalltag und ein unbefristetes Arbeitsverhältnis beim Weltmarktführer für intelligente und nachhaltige Mobilität.
 * Attraktive Vergütung, 30 Tage Urlaub sowie betriebliche Altersvorsorge und Mobilitätsangebote (u.a. Zuschuss zum Deutschlandticket)
 * Modernes Büro am ARTmax mit bester Anbindung zum ÖPNV, flexible Arbeitszeiten und Regelungen zum mobilen Arbeiten
 * Individuelle und konzernweite Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten auf Fach-, Projekt- und Führungsebene
 * Hervorragende Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten durch die Alstom University und betriebliches Ideenmanagement
 * Modernes und kollegiales Arbeitsumfeld mit Mentoring- und Patenprogrammen, Diversity & Inclusion und CSR-Aktivitäten sowie Mitarbeiterevents
 * Attraktive Angebote im Büro (z.B. Meetingräume mit Walking-Pad, höhenverstellbare Schreibtische, Eltern-Kind-Räume, Duschmöglichkeiten)
   
   

Sie müssen kein Bahnexperte:in sein, um mit uns Großes zu bewegen. Wir schätzen neugierige und innovative Menschen, die gemeinsam mit uns die nachhaltige Verkehrswende gestalten. Wir sind uns sicher, dass Sie schon bald mit Stolz in Alstom Zügen reisen werden. Wir freuen uns, mit Ihnen die Reise zu beginnen!

Equal Opportunities Statement

Alstom steht als Arbeitgeber für Chancengleichheit. Durch die Schaffung eines integrativen Arbeitsumfelds, in dem alle Mitarbeiter:innen ermutigt werden ihr volles Potenzial auszuschöpfen, werden individuelle Unterschiede geschätzt und respektiert. Alle Bewerber:innen werden allein auf Basis ihrer Qualifikation berücksichtigt, unabhängig von Hautfarbe, Religion, Geschlecht, sexueller Orientierung, Geschlechtsidentität, Alter, ethnischer und nationaler Herkunft, Behinderung oder anderen gesetzlich geschützten Merkmalen.

title: Promotion
description:
Unternehmensbeschreibung




PERVONÉ ist eine griechisch inspirierte Schmuckmarke aus Bonn, die für Selflove, Eleganz und mediterrane Leichtigkeit steht.

Unsere Designs verbinden zeitlose Ästhetik mit moderner Symbolik – inspiriert von den Göttinnen der Antike und gefertigt aus hochwertigen, wasserfesten Materialien.




Mit dem Motto „Erwecke die Göttin in dir“ möchten wir Frauen daran erinnern, ihre Stärke, Schönheit und Individualität jeden Tag zu feiern.

Unsere Kollektionen sind im Online-Shop sowie bei Galeria Kaufhof erhältlich – und werden durch ausgewählte Aktionen vor Ort präsentiert




Rollenbeschreibung




In der Rolle als Promoter:in für PERVONÉ Schmuck repräsentieren Sie unsere Marke direkt vor Ort im Galeria Kaufhof Bonn.

Sie sprechen Kundinnen aktiv an, präsentieren unsere Schmuckstücke und tragen so dazu bei, das Erlebnis „PERVONÉ“ lebendig zu machen.




Zu Ihren Aufgaben gehören:

• Vorstellung und Erklärung unserer Schmuckkollektionen

• Aktive Ansprache von Kundinnen und Weiterleitung zum Verkauf

• Tragen von PERVONÉ-Schmuck und markentypischem Outfit (weiß & gold, Greek-Goddess-Look)

• Unterstützung bei kleinen Promotionaktionen und Eventtagen

• Aufbau und Pflege eines positiven Markenimages im stationären Handel




Diese Teilzeitstelle (Minijob-Basis) ist vor Ort in Bonn angesiedelt und bietet Ihnen die Möglichkeit, Teil eines wachsenden Lifestyle-Labels zu werden.




Qualifikationen:

• Ausgeprägte Kommunikations- und Menschenkenntnis

• Sicheres, freundliches Auftreten und ein gepflegtes Erscheinungsbild

• Erfahrung im Verkauf oder in der Promotion (von Vorteil, aber kein Muss)

• Freude an Mode, Schmuck und Ästhetik

• Hohe Motivation, Eigeninitiative und Begeisterung für Markenauftritte

• Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist

• Optional: Interesse an Social Media und Markenrepräsentation

title: GTM Associate (m/f/d)
description:
TL;DR - We’re building the healthcare workforce for tomorrow. Our AI receptionist Luna is already automating patient communication in medical practices today. As the market leader in orthodontics and with a recent major funding round under our belt, we’re now scaling into additional medical specialties — and you’ll be a key contributor to make that work. As GTM Associate, you’ll help us build a world-class GTM engine and will grow professionally along the way.

Why praxipal? The shortage of skilled professionals is the biggest challenge in our healthcare system. Tens of thousands of positions remain unfilled each year, and demographic shifts are only making things worse. Medical practices rely on our AI receptionist Luna to reduce staff workload and keep care accessible for everyone. We’re growing at record speed and recently closed a $6.7M seed round with HV Capital — and we’re just getting started.

We are a tech-driven company that deliberately relies on a small, talent-dense team. What defines us is the speed and intensity with which we work — but just as important to us is our team spirit. That’s why we come into the office every day: to connect, learn from one another, and grow together. Cross-functional collaboration happens naturally here — in your day-to-day, you’ll work closely with Julius, Lisa and Daniel.

What We’re Looking For


 * First work experience in fast-paced environments, ideally combining generalist and customer-facing roles
 * Extraordinary drive, strong entrepreneurial mindset and a high level of self-motivation
 * Quick to learn and adapt to new roles, tools and automation solutions
 * Natural connector who proactively builds and develops relationships with customers, partners and team members
 * German and English at a professional level
   
   

What You’ll Do In one sentence: You’ll help us build a world-class GTM organization, driving impact through killer demos and bold lead-gen plays.


 * You turn customer interest into long-lasting partnerships
 * You represent us at events and establish them as one of our most powerful growth engines
 * You create lead-gen opportunities on your own — full ownership from start to finish
 * You sharpen our processes and play an active role in shaping our go-to-market strategy
 * You use tools to help build an automated growth and sales engine
   
   

Your Benefits


 * Competitive salary and participation in our VSOP program
 * Unparalleled learning opportunities at the frontier of AI and healthcare
 * Work alongside a strong, motivated team with ample growth opportunities
 * Urban Sports Club membership
 * Lunch subsidy via Lunchit and daily team dinners covered by the company

title: Assistant to Sales Managing Director and Team (m/w/d)
description:
IN A NUTSHELL

In dieser Rolle unterstützt du unseren Sales Managing Director und arbeitest eng mit dem gesamten Team zusammen, von der Reisekoordination bis zur Vorbereitung von Angeboten. Mit deinem Engagement bringst du uns unserem Ziel, European Champion zu werden, aktiv näher. Werde Teil unserer Erfolgsstory!

Deine Aufgaben


 * Unterstützung des Sales Managing Directors bei allen administrativen und organisatorischen Aufgaben wie Reisekostenabrechnung, Buchung und Koordination von Terminen, Dienstreisen und Meetings, Pflege und Verwaltung des Terminkalenders
 * Unterstützung des Sales-Teams bei der täglichen Verwaltung und bei Vertriebsaktivitäten
 * Pflege der Kunden-Datenbank und Sicherstellung der Datenqualität in unserem CRM-System
 * Vor- und Nachbereitung von Vertriebsunterlagen und Präsentationen
 * Koordination und Planung von Meetings sowie Logistik für Vertriebsevents
 * Erstellung und Nachverfolgung von Angeboten und Vertragsdokumenten
 * Bearbeitung von Kundenanfragen und Weiterleitung relevanter Anliegen an die zuständigen Teammitglieder
 * Organisation von internen und externen Meetings inklusive der Bereitstellung notwendiger Unterlagen
   
   

Dein Profil


 * Abgeschlossene kaufmännische Ausbildung oder ein abgeschlossenes Studium in Betriebswirtschaft oder einem verwandten Fachbereich
 * Erfahrung im Assistenzbereich, idealerweise in einem internationalen Sales- oder Management-Umfeld
 * Organisationstalent mit strukturierter, vorausschauender Arbeitsweise
 * Sicherer Umgang mit MS Office, insbesondere Excel und PowerPoint, Erfahrung mit CRM-Systemen, vorzugsweise HubSpot
 * Teamgeist, Kommunikationsstärke und Diskretion im Umgang mit vertraulichen Informationen
 * Verhandlungssicher in Deutsch und Englisch
   
   

Warum wir?


 * Flex Work & Homeoffice-Optionen
 * attraktives Gehalt und vielseitige Benefits (wie das neuste Apple oder Android Smartphone, Weiterbildungsbudget, Fitness-Abo, uvm.) 
 * vielfältige Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten in einem dynamischen Umfeld
 * unschlagbarer Teamgeist, flache Hierarchien, kurze Entscheidungswege 
 * Headquarter im Herzen Münchens
   
   

QPLIX ist ein Arbeitgeber, der die Chancengleichheit fördert. Wir glauben, dass Integration und Vielfalt der Schlüssel zu einer erfolgreichen und besseren Arbeitswelt sind.

Kontakt

QPLIX GmbH

Milena Heidinger

People, Organization & Culture

Nußbaumstr. 12

80336 München

+49 (89) 998 2716 62

career@qplix.com

https://www.qplix.com/de/

Über uns

QPLIX entwickelt und betreibt eine FinTech-Plattform für das Management komplexer Vermögen. Über die Plattform werden derzeit insgesamt mehr als 300 Mrd. EUR von namhaften nationalen und internationalen Kund:innen wie Family Offices, Asset Managern und Banken verwaltet. Sie nutzen QPLIX für das Management aller Bestandteile ihres verwalteten Vermögens, das von Aktien, Anleihen, Private Equity Funds und Immobilien über Kunst und Sammlerstücke bis hin zu Flugzeugen und Golfplätzen reicht. Das QPLIX-Team vereint Software-Engineering und Finanz-Expertise mit dem Ziel, die Finanzplattform der Zukunft zu erschaffen. Werde Teil unseres Teams, übernimm einflussreiche Aufgaben und setze FinTech-Trends von morgen!

title: Specialist
description:
KOTRA (Korea Trade-Investment Promotion Agency) ist die staatlich geförderte Handels- und Investmentorganisation Südkoreas. Sie wurde 1962 gegründet und fördert seither Koreas internationalen Handel und Export.

Das KOTRA-Büro in Hamburg dient seit 1971 als kompetenter Ansprechpartner für deutsche Unternehmen, zuständig für nord- und ostdeutschen Bundesländer. Die Aktivitäten umfassen unter anderem die Markterschließung (Marktforschung, Ausfindigmachen potentieller Kunden, Vermittlung von B2B-Geschäftsbeziehungen zwischen koreanischen Zulieferern und deutschen Kunden usw.) für koreanische KMU in Deutschland, die Organisation von Messen und Handelsdelegationen in Deutschland und Korea sowie die Beratung deutscher Unternehmen, die in Südkorea investieren möchten(Anwerbung von FDI).




Zur Verstärkung unseres Teams in Hamburg suchen wir zum nächstmöglichen Termin einen

Mitarbeiter (m/w/d) in den folgenden Bereichen:




Ihre Aufgaben : Unterstützung koreanischer Unternehmen bei der Markterschließung in Deutschland

- durch Sichtung des Marktes für bestimmte Produkte und Suche nach interessierten Kunden

- durch Marktforschung zu Trends, Regularien und zur Wettbewerbssituation

- durch Teilnahme an Messen und Marketing-Veranstaltungen 

- durch Produktvermarktung an potenzielle Kunden in Deutschland und Vermittlung von B2B-Geschäftsbeziehungen zwischen koreanischen Anbietern und deutschen Abnehmern




Unsere Anforderungen

    -  Wenn Koreanisch beherrschend, Deutsch auf C2-Niveau (nahezu muttersprachliches Niveau)

* Ein Zertifikat ist nicht erforderlich

    -  Wenn Koreanisch nicht beherrschend, Deutsch C2 Niveau und Englisch C2 Niveau

-  Erfahrung in ähnlichen Aufgaben, z. B Marketing, Sales, bevorzugt

    -  Erfahrung in Branchen* bevorzugt

* Wasserstoff, künstliche Intelligenz, Energie/Elektrizität, Batterie, Automobil, Luft– und Raumfahrt

    - Verfügbarkeit im August oder ab 1. September bevorzugt

-  Geschäftsreise ins Ausland (Korea, EU) und innerhalb Deutschland möglich

-  Führerschein bevorzugt   




Wir bieten:

- Gehalt : € 43.000-45.000 pro Jahr (Brutto, Einstieg) / verhandelbar je nach Berufserfahrung

- Probezeit : 3 Monate (90% des monatlichen Gehalts)

- Art der Stelle : Vollzeit (Gleitzeit)

- Unterstützung der Sprachfortbildung in Koreanisch oder in einem arbeitsbezogenen Kurs, Teilnahme an Seminaren mit Branchenexperten, Team Spirit Day usw.  




Wie Sie sich bewerben: vom 30. 06. 2025 bis 09. 07. 2025

- Senden Sie Ihre Unterlagen an den Ansprechpartner

① Lebenslauf in Koreanisch oder Deutsch oder Englisch (Auswahl)

② Motivationsschreiben in Koreanisch oder Deutsch oder Englisch (Auswahl) 

③ Relevante Zeugnisse (Ausbildung, Uni-Abschlusszeugnis, Arbeitszeugnisse usw.)

- Nach der Sichtung der eingereichten Bewerbungsunterlagen kontaktieren wir vorausgewählte Kandidaten für das Bewerbungsgespräch.

- Bewerbungsunterlagen bitte nur per E-Mail einreichen. 

 

Ihr Ansprechpartner: Frau Yujeong Han

Email: yj.han@kotra.or.kr

Homepage: www.kotra-hamburg.de

title: Retail Brand Marketing Specialist – EMEA (m/w/d) - Fixed Term 6 months
description:
Your Opportunity at ARC’TERYX:




As the Retail Brand Marketing Specialist– EMEA, you are responsible for the implementation of the Retail Brand Marketing (RBM) strategy for the Brand’s Retail spaces (Brand Stores and Factory Outlets) and for the Branded Spaces of Wholesales partners (Shop-In-Shops) all along the in-store consumer journey (attract, engagement, conversion levels). You project-manage the Shop-in-Shops implementation in the region, in alignment with the EMEA business goals. Your understanding of the Retail and Wholesale landscapes enables you to excite the consumer and connect them to our Brand and product through premium retail experiences.




This position is a fixed-term contract for 6 months. Starting date : as soon as possible. The role is based out of our Garching office, near Munich and is open to hybrid remote work (2 days at the office – 2 days at home - 1 day home/office). Candidates must be eligible to work in Germany.




Meet Your Future Team:




The EMEA Marketing team is composed of a passionate group of professionals, all with an international background. The main objective of the department is to develop and execute consumer-facing regional and global strategies for the European markets.

In addition to reporting to the Senior Manager, Retail & Trade Marketing – EMEA and working closely with the Retail & Trade Marketing team, you will be collaborating cross-functionally with team members from the Community, Experiences, Sports Marketing and Brand Comms teams in EMEA and the Retail Brand Marketing teams at HQ.






If you were the Retail Brand Marketing Specialist – EMEA now, here are some of the core activities you would be doing:
 * Implementing and localizing brand and seasonal campaigns including windows, in-store elements, graphics, and product communication for new and existing Stores within the EMEA Retail fleet (Brand Stores and Factory Outlets), and for Wholesales Shop-in-Shops and key partners’ Branded Spaces
 * Project-managing, developing, and executing new Shop-in-Shops at key wholesale partners, including planning, designing, budgeting, furniture sourcing, vendor management, installation
 * Supporting the commercial teams to determine new Shop-in-shop and Branded Spaces locations in alignment with EMEA epicenter strategy and regional business goals, by providing assets and tools to ease decision making
 * Maintaining the EMEA Shop-In-Shop fleet at a high level of alignment with RBM standards, including refit, redesign, and instore consumer journey optimization
 * Coordinating relationship with key external agencies, print vendors and installers, sourcing appropriate suppliers, negotiating prices and sales terms
 * Advocating to the global brand teams about specific regional assets needs
 * Supporting the EMEA Trade Marketing team with RBM input for seasonal marketing plans of key wholesale partners
 * Supporting in the maintenance of showroom guidelines for product presentation and brand experience
 * Ensuring premium and consistent brand storytelling in physical brand expressions aligning with current brand standards and brand focus
 * Managing all in store POP, stores supplies productions and inventory for Retail Stores, key wholesale partners, coordinating suppliers, budgets and parent orders
 * Supporting consumer events Brand Experience activations and installations
 * Owning and managing assigned budget




Here are some of the things you could be working on in the future:
 * Ensuring RBM roll-out plans align with EMEA integrated marketing plans, at EMEA Retail stores and Wholesale Branded Spaces
 * Delivering RBM executions at Brand Retail Stores with a specific attention to localisation and stores’ environment




Are you our next Retail Brand Experience Specialist – EMEA ?
 * You have a Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Marketing, Retail Design, or related field
 * You have 3+ years experience in Retail Marketing
 * You have proven success in a fast-paced, cross-functional integrated marketing environment, as well as the ability to thrive in a dynamic, constantly evolving, and highly competitive industry  
 * You are a performance focused individual with experience working from concept to completion, dealing with ambiguity and working toward clarity, while maintaining high quality in outcomes and a strong sense of accountability  
 * You have Project Management expertise (ex: driving timelines and managing budget), strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to plan and prioritize  
 * You have the ability to establish relationships, collaborate and influence across all levels, functions, geographies - internal and external  
 * You have a strong understanding of a multi-brand, cross-functional, vertically integrated organization and of the EMEA market
 * You have knowledge of the sports apparel industry, ideally also of Arc’teryx
 * Speaking German or French is an asset
 * Your passion for your work is paralleled by your passion for getting outside and living it







Equal Opportunity




Arc’teryx is committed to actively creating and fostering a culture of inclusivity where voices are heard, people are seen, and values are respected. We care about the uniqueness of our applicants, employees, and guests, and we do so in a safe space fueled by curiosity and acceptance. 




Creating an inclusive workplace is connected to our core value Do Right while also having the added benefit of helping make our business better. We believe inclusion helps us to create a healthier, happier workplace, drive creativity and innovation, and reflect the communities where we operate.  




All applicants, employees, and guests can expect equality of opportunity and fair treatment in alignment with our values.




Leave it Better

We believe that the mountains transform us, that how we adventure matters, and that there’s always a better way. 

Join us in creating positive change in ourselves, our communities, and the world. 




Live it. Get out there - the mountains make us better 

Disruptive evolution. In pursuit of better. Always. 

Commit. We set bold objectives and see them through.

title: PPL Specialist (Pay Per Lead)
description:
The Pearl Lemon Group is a conglomerate that was incorporated by Deepak Shukla in October 2016. Starting life as a digital marketing agency; the company has since entered the accountancy, legal, food & beverage, game development, property, as well as reputation management space amongst a whole host of other areas.Our mission is to help businesses of all sizes grow their online presence and achieve their marketing goals. At Pearl Lemon Group, we pride ourselves on being a team of dedicated and passionate individuals who are committed to providing exceptional services to our clients. We believe in going above and beyond to deliver results that exceed expectations, and our track record of success speaks for itself.With a focus on innovation and staying ahead of the curve, we are constantly exploring new techniques and strategies to help our clients stay ahead of the competition. Our team is made up of experts in their respective fields, who bring a wealth of experience and knowledge to every project.Whether you're a small business just starting out or a large enterprise looking to expand your reach, we have the expertise and resources to help you achieve your goals. Join us on this exciting journey and let's work together to take your business to the next level!

The Role

PPL Specialist (Pay Per Lead) – Delhi, India

Location: Delhi, India | Full-Time | On-Site

Industry: Digital Marketing | Lead Generation | B2B & B2C

Experience Level: Mid-Senior Level

Are you a lead-gen machine who thrives on hitting targets and maximizing ROI? Pearl Lemon Group is searching for a PPL Specialist with serious performance marketing chops to scale our lead acquisition campaigns across multiple verticals.

What You’ll Do


 * Build, manage, and optimize Pay Per Lead campaigns
 * Collaborate with design and copy teams to drive high-converting funnels
 * Source traffic through social ads, search, affiliate networks, or cold outreach
 * Analyze lead quality, CPL, and conversion metrics daily
 * Test new channels and double down on what performs
   
   

Why Join Pearl Lemon?


 * Be part of a fast-growing, globally distributed team of 100+
 * Full ownership of your campaigns – no micromanagement
 * Access to tools, designers, developers, and everything you need to win
 * Performance-based rewards and endless growth opportunities
 * Work with diverse global brands and innovative teams
   
   

Ideal Profile

What You Bring


 * Proven experience running PPL campaigns
 * Hands-on knowledge of platforms like Meta Ads, Google Ads, native ads, etc.
 * Data-driven mindset with A/B testing experience
 * Strong understanding of lead validation and tracking tools
 * A hunger to scale, test, and win
   
   

What's on Offer?


 * Work within a company with a solid track record of success
 * Excellent career development opportunities
 * Attractive salary & benefits

title: Go-to-Market / Partnerships Intern (m/f/d)
description:
TL;DR - We’re building the healthcare workforce for tomorrow. Our AI receptionist Luna is already automating patient communication in medical practices today. As the market leader in orthodontics and with a recent major funding round under our belt, we’re now scaling into additional medical specialties. As GTM / Partnerships Intern, you’ll build the partnerships engine that fuels our growth.

Why praxipal? The shortage of skilled professionals is the biggest challenge in our healthcare system. Tens of thousands of positions remain unfilled each year, and demographic shifts are only making things worse. Medical practices rely on our AI receptionist Luna to reduce staff workload and keep care accessible for everyone. We’re growing at record speed and recently closed a $6.7M seed round with HV Capital — and we’re just getting started.

We are a tech-driven company that deliberately relies on a small, talent-dense team. What defines us is the speed and intensity with which we work — but just as important to us is our team spirit. That’s why we come into the office every day: to connect, learn from one another, and grow together. Cross-functional collaboration happens naturally here — in your day-to-day, you’ll work closely with Julius and Daniel.

What We’re Looking For


 * Previous experience in customer-facing roles such as business development, sales, customer success or consulting
 * Extraordinary drive, strong entrepreneurial mindset and a high level of self-motivation
 * Natural connector who proactively builds and develops relationships with customers, partners and team members
 * You keep things running smoothly - highly organized, structured, and always two steps ahead
 * You communicate with clarity and impact - building trust, inspiring confidence, and making complex ideas sound simple
 * German and English at a professional level
 * It’s a plus if you have prior experience with startups, VC or within other fast-paced work environments
   
   

What You’ll Do In one sentence: You’ll build our partnerships approach and turn collaboration with industry partners into a sustainable growth engine.


 * You identify potential partners, reach out, and turn first conversations into strong, lasting relationships
 * You manage and deepen relationships with existing partners
 * You design a structured approach to partner communication, making collaboration seamless and scalable
 * You craft an incentive scheme that rewards our industry partners and drives mutual growth
 * You build an automated workflow that calculates and transfers commissions with precision - no friction, no delays
 * You collaborate closely with our leadership team and bring them into senior-level partnership conversations that move the needle
   
   

Your Benefits


 * Competitive salary - and if you excel, you’ll have the chance to grow this into a full-time role with us
 * Unparalleled learning opportunities at the frontier of AI and healthcare
 * Work alongside a strong, motivated team with ample growth opportunities
 * Urban Sports Club membership
 * Lunch subsidy via Lunchit and daily team dinners covered by the company

title: (Junior) Influencer Relations Manager*In (m/w/d)
description:
DEPARTD ist eine „Creative Technologies“ und „Social Marketing“ Agentur in der DACH-Region. Wir arbeiten mit absoluten Top-Marken auf den relevanten Plattformen der Generation Z. TikTok, Instagram, YouTube und Snapchat bilden hierbei den Mittelpunkt unserer Arbeiten. Unser kreatives Team schafft plattformübergreifende Konzepte und authentische Inhalte. Neben Social Media Kampagnen, Werbefilmproduktionen & Influencer Aktivierungen steht vor allem das Thema Augmented Reality in unserem Fokus. Dort gehören wir durch unsere offizielle Partnerschaft mit Instagram/Facebook & Snapchat zu einer Handvoll Partner*innen weltweit und sind damit eine der führenden Agenturen auf diesem Gebiet. Durch diesen besonderen Status setzen wir viele Projekte auch direkt mit und für diese Social-Media Plattformen um. Um unser Wachstum weiter zu fördern, brauchen wir Dich als (Junior) Influencer Relations Manager*in.


DEINE VERANTWORTLICHKEITEN

   
   
 * Du agierst du als Schnittstelle zwischen Influencer*innen und Kunden und bist als Projekt-Manager*in für die ganzheitliche Umsetzung der Kampagnen zuständig
   
   
 * Angelehnt an das Konzept einer Kampagne bist du dafür zuständig, die passende Influencer*innen-Auswahl anhand eines Kundenbriefings zu treffen, sie mit den Verantwortlichen abzustimmen, diese zu buchen und dich mit Support von unserem Legal-Team um die vertragliche Abwicklung zu kümmern
   
   
 * Du pflegst eine gute Bindung und Kommunikation zu den Künstler*innen und Managements der Social Media Branche (Instagram, TikTok & YouTube)
   
   
 * Du hast ein Verständnis der KPIs im Bereich Influencer Marketing und weißt diese Daten auszuwerten und entsprechend in einem Reporting zusammenzufassen
   
   
 * Du überzeugst durch Kommunikationsstärke
   
   


UNSERE ANFORDERUNGEN

   
   
 * Du hast ein abgeschlossenes Studium in den Bereichen BWL, Marketing oder Kommunikation oder einer vergleichbaren Ausbildung
   
   
 * Du bringst erste Berufserfahrung im Bereich Influencer Marketing und/oder Projektmanagement mit
   
   
 * Du hast dir im Idealfall bereits ein Influencer Netzwerk aufgebaut und bist offen dieses weiter aus- und aufzubauen (Networking-Events und Kaltakquise)
   
   
 * Du begeisterst dich mit großer Leidenschaft für Social Media (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube und Snapchat) sowie Spaß am Kontakt mit Influencer*innen
   
   
 * Verhandlungsgeschick gehört zu deinen Stärken
   
   
 * Du übernimmst gerne Verantwortung und hast Spaß daran, dich neuen Herausforderungen zu stellen
   
   
 * Du hast gute MS Office Kenntnisse, insbesondere Excel und PowerPoint
   
   
 * Du sprichst fließend Deutsch und hast ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch
   
   


WIR BIETEN:

   
   
 * Start-Up-Atmosphäre mit flexiblen Arbeitszeiten und flachen Hierarchien
   
   
 * Ein dynamisches, offenes und talentiertes Team
   
   
 * Direkte Zusammenarbeit mit dem Gründer- und Managementteam
   
   
 * Eine offene Feedback-Kultur, regelmäßige Team-Events sowie individuelle Fort- und Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten
   
   
 * Wachstumschancen – Hohe Unabhängigkeit und Gestaltungsfreiheit
   
   
 * Ein modernes, helles Office im Herzen von Kreuzberg
   
   
 * Einen monatlichen Lunch-Zuschuss und weitere Benefits
   
   
 * Du liebst die BVG? Wir haben einen ÖPNV Zuschuss für dich
   
   
 * 28 Urlaubstage im Jahr
   
   


Du erfüllst nicht alle Anforderungen? Dann überzeuge uns von anderen interessanten Fähigkeiten und Erfahrungen, die du mitbringst und die du bei uns einbringen möchtest.

Interesse?

title: Trainee E-Commerce, OPUS und someday, Oelde, (m/w/d)
description:
Mit Begeisterung und Motivation machen wir unsere Modemarken OPUS und someday europaweit erfolgreich. Diesen Erfolg wollen wir mit unserem wachsenden Netzwerk weiter ausbauen. Wir denken Shopping neu. Wir haben große Ziele und arbeiten im Detail.

Dazu suchen wir Kolleg:innen, die Lust haben, mit Leidenschaft und Ideenreichtum über sich und uns hinauszuwachsen. Komm zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt als Trainee E-Commerce (m/w/d) in unser Team am Standort Oelde (Region Münster/Bielefeld/Dortmund).

Das erwartet dich

 * Um unsere Marken an jedem Online Touchpoint unserer Kundin perfekt zu platzieren gestaltest du mit uns eine innovative Customer Journey
 * Dabei lernst du unsere neuesten Tools und Systeme kennen, arbeitest kennzahlen- und datenbasiert und bist nah an unseren Produkten
